zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan d' Alesbury於大約1312年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Philip De Aylesbury38歲，母親Margaret Keynes22歲。她於1329年與Sir John Hampden在美國奧克拉荷馬州凱米德萊頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1359年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 哈普登享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan d' Alesbury于大约1312年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲Philip De Aylesbury38岁，母亲Margaret Keynes22岁。她于1329年与Sir John Hampden在美国奥克拉荷马州凱米德萊頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1359年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾格亞特 哈普登享年48岁。

variants.name: Aylesbury

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan d' Alesbury was born about 1312, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Philip De Aylesbury, was 38 and her mother, Margaret Keynes, was 22. She married Sir John Hampden in 1329, in Middleton, Kay, Oklahoma, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1359, in Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan d' Alesbury est née environ 1312, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Philip De Aylesbury, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret Keynes, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Hampden en 1329, à Middleton, Kay, Oklahoma, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1359, à Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan d' Alesburyが約1312年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Philip De Aylesburyは38歳，母Margaret Keynesは22歳であった。1329年にアメリカ合衆国オクラホマ州ケイミッドレトンでSir John Hampdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1359年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ハンプデンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan d' Alesbury(이)가 대략 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip De Aylesbury(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Keynes(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1329년 미국 오클라호마 주 카이 미들레턴에서 Sir John Hampden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 함p든에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan d' Alesbury родилась около 1312 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Philip De Aylesbury было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Keynes, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Hampden в 1329 г. в местности миддлетон, кеи, Оклахома, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1359 г. в местности грит хампден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
